title: AgentScan Action Inputs (v2)
description: Semantic reference for the `with:` inputs accepted by the AgentScan GitHub Action (action.yml). GitHub Actions passes every input as a string, so booleans/arrays below are the string encodings actions/core expects (e.g. "true"/"false", comma-separated or JSON-array-syntax lists) rather than native JSON types.

allowed-users.description: GitHub usernames to exclude from scanning.

trusted-author-associations.description: Author associations to exclude from scanning (e.g. trusted maintainers opening their own PRs/issues).

scan-pull-requests.description: Analyze pull requests. Enabled by default.

mode.description:
Controls what the action does with its findings.
- full: post a comment and apply labels (default)
- comment: post a comment only
- labels: apply labels only
- silent: run analysis but post no comment or labels (outputs are still set)

comment-on-organic.description: Post a comment even when the analysis result is 'organic'. Organic accounts are silenced by default.

cache-path.description: Path to a directory used to cache analysis results between workflow runs (e.g. '.agentscan-cache'). Caching is disabled if omitted.

label-community-flagged.description: Label applied when the account is on the community-verified automations list.

label-mixed.description: Label applied when the account has mixed automation signals.

label-automation.description: Label applied when the account is classified as automated.

auto-close.description: Automatically close PRs/issues opened by flagged accounts.

auto-close-classifications.description: Classifications that trigger auto-close. Requires auto-close to be true.

message-organic.description: Custom comment message posted when the account is classified as organic (human).

message-mixed.description: Custom comment message posted when the account has mixed automation signals.

message-automation.description: Custom comment message posted when the account is classified as automated.

message-community-flagged.description: Custom comment message posted when the account is on the community-verified automations list.
